job/payload.recent-context:
[user]: 1	# Terminal Rain
2	
3	A Python script that creates a mesmerizing rain and lightning animation directly in your terminal using the `curses` library. Now with sound effects!
4	
5	## Calm Rain
6	![Calm Rain](calmrain.gif)
7	
8	## Thunderstorm
9	![Thunderstorm](thunderstorm.gif)
10	
11	## Disclaimer
12	
13	I'm a hobby coder and write most of my scripts with Cursor's help, apologies if anything is broken or especially wonky in the source code.
14	
15	I'm relatively new to Linux and wanted to make something like this for fun after seeing some of the other projects like bash-pipes, asciiquarium, etc...
